# Pull Request: EPMCDMETST-43701 — To-Do App

**PR Title**: `feat(todo-app): Implement To-Do App React SPA (EPMCDMETST-43701)`  
**Base Branch**: `main`  
**Commits**: 7 (`2dd4ea4` → `ccb869f`)  
**Files Changed**: 52 · Lines Added: +9,103 · Lines Removed: -9  
**Generated by**: pr-agent v1.0 · 2026-05-26

---

## Summary

Implemented a fully functional To-Do App React SPA for JIRA story EPMCDMETST-43701, completing all 7 functional requirements and 7 acceptance criteria. The application enables users to add tasks that persist across page refreshes via localStorage, with graceful error handling for storage failures. All 37 unit and integration tests pass with 93.47% code coverage, and the production build is 119KB gzip — well under the 150KB performance target.

## Changes Made

### Pipeline Outputs (`outputs/`)
- **`outputs/requirements.md`** — 7 FR, 4 NFR, 7 AC, task schema, edge cases (commit `2dd4ea4`)
- **`outputs/architecture.md`** — 14-section architecture: 6 components, data flow, tech stack, performance strategy (commit `93efa23`)
- **`outputs/architecture-review.md`** — Design review: 0 critical issues, 4 important gaps resolved, Approved (commit `3df2816`)
- **`outputs/impl-plan.md`** — 27 tasks across 6 phases, ~42h estimate, critical path analysis (commit `4a19cce`)

- **`outputs/verification-report.md`** — 9-gate verification, overall score 94/100, Approved (commit `ccb869f`)

### Application Source (`todo-app/`)
- **`src/main.jsx`** — Entry point: React 19 StrictMode + ErrorBoundary wrapper
- **`src/App.jsx`** — Root component: task state, localStorage hook, input/list/banner composition
- **`src/App.module.css`** — Page layout and card styles using design tokens
- **`src/styles/tokens.css`** — CSS custom properties: colors, spacing, typography, borders, shadows
- **`src/hooks/useLocalStorage.js`** — Custom hook: localStorage read/write with QuotaExceededError + SecurityError handling, returns `[value, setter, error]`
- **`src/components/ErrorBoundary.jsx`** — Class component error boundary with "Try again" recovery
- **`src/components/StorageBanner.jsx`** — `role="alert"` warning banner, dismissible, renders null when no error
- **`src/components/TaskInput.jsx`** — Controlled input with Enter key support, disabled button on empty/whitespace, maxLength=500
- **`src/components/TaskList.jsx`** — Renders task list or empty state `<p>`
- **`src/components/TaskItem.jsx`** — `React.memo` wrapped list item

### Tests (`todo-app/tests/`)
- **`tests/App.test.jsx`** — 12 integration tests: heading, empty state, add flow, localStorage, StorageBanner, Enter key
- **`tests/useLocalStorage.test.js`** — 7 unit tests: init, read/write, QuotaExceeded, SecurityError, malformed JSON
- **`tests/TaskInput.test.jsx`** — 10 unit tests: disabled state, onAdd, Enter key, maxLength, onChange
- **`tests/TaskList.test.jsx`** — 4 unit tests: empty state, list rendering
- **`tests/StorageBanner.test.jsx`** — 4 unit tests: null/message/dismiss/alert role
- **`tests/setup.js`** — Custom localStorage mock for Vitest jsdom environment

### Configuration
- **`package.json`** — React 19 + Vite 8 + Vitest + RTL dependencies and scripts
- **`vite.config.js`** — Vitest test block: globals, jsdom, setup file, v8 coverage with 80% threshold
- **`eslint.config.js`** — ESLint with react-hooks plugin

---

## Known Limitations

- **Task management out of scope**: Complete, delete, and edit operations are not implemented in this story (EPMCDMETST-43701 scope is add-task only).
- **Single-user only**: No authentication or multi-user support — localStorage is browser-scoped by design.
- **No E2E browser tests**: Playwright E2E not in scope for this story; browser compatibility covered by Vite targeting latest 2 major browser versions.
- **README not updated**: `todo-app/README.md` is the default Vite template — project-specific content is a recommended follow-up.
- **Generic error branch**: The catch-all error branch in `useLocalStorage.js:26` has no dedicated test (branch coverage 90%; non-blocking).

## Reviewer Checklist

**Correctness (20%)**
- [ ] All 7 Functional Requirements (FR-01 to FR-07) implemented
- [ ] All 4 Non-Functional Requirements (performance, security, scalability, reliability) met
- [ ] All 7 Acceptance Criteria (AC-01 to AC-07) satisfied
- [ ] Data flow matches `outputs/architecture.md`
- [ ] Enter key adds task (AC-03)
- [ ] Whitespace-only input treated as empty (FR-03 edge case)

**Security (20%)**
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] User input rendered via JSX (React auto-escaping — no XSS risk)
- [ ] Input bounded at `maxLength={500}` to prevent oversized localStorage entries
- [ ] No `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` usage
- [ ] `npm audit` confirms 0 vulnerabilities

**Error Handling (15%)**
- [ ] `QuotaExceededError` surfaced via `StorageBanner` with user-friendly message
- [ ] `SecurityError` surfaced via `StorageBanner` with user-friendly message
- [ ] Malformed JSON in localStorage falls back to empty array (no crash)
- [ ] `ErrorBoundary` prevents full app crash on unexpected runtime errors
- [ ] Banner is dismissible and resets on next add

**Test Coverage (20%)**
- [ ] Overall coverage ≥80% (actual: 93.47%)
- [ ] All components have dedicated test files
- [ ] Happy path tested (add task, show in list, clear input)
- [ ] Edge cases tested (whitespace, localStorage errors, load from storage)
- [ ] All 37 tests passing with no skips

**Code Clarity (10%)**
- [ ] Components ≤38 lines — small and focused
- [ ] Descriptive names: `handleAddTask`, `visibleError`, `isDisabled`, `bannerDismissed`
- [ ] No magic numbers (only `500` for maxLength — self-evident)
- [ ] Consistent naming conventions (camelCase, PascalCase components)

**DRY Principle (10%)**
- [ ] All localStorage logic encapsulated in `useLocalStorage` hook
- [ ] No duplicated component structure
- [ ] `isDisabled` computed once in `TaskInput`
- [ ] CSS Modules scoped per component — no global conflicts

**Dependency Safety (5%)**
- [ ] `npm audit` — 0 vulnerabilities
- [ ] `package-lock.json` committed
- [ ] All packages current (react@19, vite@8, vitest@4)
- [ ] Minimal dependency footprint for story scope

**Pipeline Documentation**
- [ ] `outputs/requirements.md` — requirements captured ✅
- [ ] `outputs/architecture.md` — architecture documented ✅
- [ ] `outputs/architecture-review.md` — design review completed ✅

- [ ] `outputs/code-review.md` — code review 96/100 ✅
